title: Senate Rejects Measure to Restrict Iran War Hours Before Key Legal Deadline (50-47, Collins flips)
snippet: Senate rejected Democratic-led WPR effort 50-47. Sen. Susan Collins (R-ME) voted with Democrats for first time since war began. Rand Paul (R-KY) also voted yes. Fetterman (D-PA) sole Democrat voting against. Adam Schiff and Schumer forced vote on eve of May 1 deadline.
tag_reason: 6th WPR vote with new Republican defection (Collins); distinct from previous 5th vote (4/23)
